validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_packaging_manifest.py
validation_results.summary: Package manifest validation rejects forbidden paths, path escapes, untracked release inputs, unsupported dirty states, invalid hashes, and semantic payloads while dry-run refuses publishing and lock creation.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_example_project_smoke.py
validation_results.summary: Example project smoke validates fixture metadata, output hash comparison, path containment, status/hash shape, and semantic boundary without creating product semantics, packages, or locks.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_migration_coverage.py
validation_results.summary: Migration coverage validates row contract, summary counts, blocked Human Gate rows, report hash, duplicate ids, stale summaries, unsupported statuses, and semantic boundary.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository python -m drd_harness.cli.main runtime-boundary-check repository/src
validation_results.summary: Runtime source has no construction authority imports or direct construction authority path reads.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests
validation_results.summary: Full repository test suite passed with 471 tests.
